message.content:
@startuml
title generate_delta_main.cc -> delta_diff_generator.cc -> payload_file.cc -> payload_generation_config.cc

participant "generate\_delta\_main\.cc" as GDM
participant "delta\_diff\_generator\.cc" as DDG
participant "payload\_file\.cc" as PF
participant "payload\_generation\_config\.cc" as PGC

note over GDM : "--dynamic_partition_info_file"

activate GDM
    auto number on
    
    box #LightBlue brilo::KeyValueStore.Load(file) endbox
        activate GDM
        
            note right of GDM 
                manifest_.SerializeToString()
                
                Write(serialized_manifest.data())
            end note
            
            
        
        deactivate GDM
    

deactivate GDM


@enduml
